Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against Associated Insulation Of California, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-11-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kyle J. Clawson of SELMAN BREITMAN LLP (415-979-0400), appearing for intervenor / moving party Fireman's Fund Insurance Company, the insurer of defendant Associated Insulation of California, Inc., a suspended corporation
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party James Greely

RULING:
INTERVENOR FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST ASSOCIATED INSULATION OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

At the Mechling (#275224) hearing the Court granted plaintiffs' request for the parties to also argue the same motions in the Greely (#275502), Corns (#275959), and Barstad (#276258) cases. Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's motion to set aside entry of default and default judgment is granted. Fireman's Fund is allowed to bring said motion. (See Western Heritage Ins. Co. v. Superior Court (2011) 199 Cal.App.4th 1196.) The default entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on July 21, 2010 and the amended default entered March 19, 2012 and the default judgment entered against defendant Associated Insulation of California on May 30, 2013 are set aside pursuant to the court's inherent, equitable power to set aside a default on the ground of extrinsic fraud or mistake. Plaintiff's request for a continuance is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Cindy Garis of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 402 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
